note: Ute Conference baseline SEED source. Builds the real pre-import workspace: a district registry of the known Ute Conference districts plus EMPTY team shells (no rosters) per season + age division + team code, so real player files import into existing teams. NO player/coach data lives here. districtId is derived deterministically from the name (districtIdSlug); districts not already in the seeded registry get provisional blank branding (brandingProvisional: true). Team codes are the classification codes the parser supports (A1..A4, B1..B4, C1, C2, D2); parenthetical sub-labels like 'GridIron A1 (Bonneville)' are NOT distinguished by the current classification parser (future work). Expand by adding district names, seasons, or per-age-division code lists.
